title: 7 code Large Dish Drying Rack for Kitchen Counter,Detachable Large Capacity Dish Drainer Organizer with Utensil Holder,2-Tier Dish Drying Rack with Drain Board,Black
features: 【Detachable 2 Tier Dish Rack】This drying rack for kitchen counter take a detachable 2-tier design. Together with a utensil holder, a cup rack, providing a large space for storing tableware such as dishes, plates, bowls, mugs, kitchen pots and frying pans.

【Auto-draining Drainboard】The dish drying rack includes central drainage holes and a swivel spout, making sure the water flows directly into the sink, not onto the countertop.The swivel spout is 360° rotatable so you can put the rack next to the sink in the best position for your needs, and have it work.

【Rustproof and Sturdy】The escurridor de platos is made of premium carbon steel with black powder finished. Corrosion Resistant and Rust Resistant are ideal for kitchen and food applications. the sturdy construction will provide a strong load-bearing to storing all your kitchenware easily.

【Tool-free Assembly】No screws and tools are needed, you can easily assemble the dish rack drainer together. Just following the help of the installation manual, no tools included! It Only Takes 1 min to install a perfect dish drying rack with drainboard.

【Multifunctional Rack】 Besides drain board, this kitchen dish drying rack comes with a cup rack and a utensil holder, the side cutlery rack can hold various utensils, meet your needs for storing kitchenware.
